customer_reviews_summary: ANTHONY (5★): Love the oil not so much the filter. I really wish you guys would get the amsoil ea17 filter back in stock, its been far to long they've been on back order. ; RONALD (5★): I have used this product in my 2000 Camry since 2004 (odometer: 71,000) until the present time (odometer 328,000 +) and in my 2006 Camry since May, 2025. I don't think that there is a better oil made! (By the way, I usually change the oil filter--I use the WIX oil filters--every 6 months. ) ; LARRY (5★): I have done oil samples and after next test it should be a very informative result ; BRODERICK (5★): From my 67 chevelle to my 2024 GMC Sierra my wife's car and the kids this oil has me covered ; HERBERT (5★): I have used it in my f150 with 2. 7 got 285000 on my truck with no engine problems what so ever. ; MANNY (5★): I always put Amsoil in all my vehicles and I highly recommend oil the 0/20 signature series is the best on the market never had a problem with any of my vehicles using Amsoil ; SERGE (5★): Iam gone stay a amsiol fan forever ; SETH (5★): Great oil is the one thing I can rely on when the auto manufacturers keep reducing their oil viscosity to achieve fuel efficiency for some tree hugging politician. ; JERALD (5★): Read all the reviews , watched all the videos, it's the only oil I'll trust in my car ; WILSON (5★): Whether viewed in terms of quiet operation or evaporation loss, it stands alone—no other product can hold a candle to it.

customer_reviews_summary: ANTHONY (5★): Love the oil not so much the filter. I really wish you guys would get the amsoil ea17 filter back in stock, its been far to long they've been on back order. ; RONALD (5★): I have used this product in my 2000 Camry since 2004 (odometer: 71,000) until the present time (odometer 328,000 +) and in my 2006 Camry since May, 2025. I don't think that there is a better oil made! (By the way, I usually change the oil filter--I use the WIX oil filters--every 6 months. ) ; LARRY (5★): I have done oil samples and after next test it should be a very informative result ; BRODERICK (5★): From my 67 chevelle to my 2024 GMC Sierra my wife's car and the kids this oil has me covered ; HERBERT (5★): I have used it in my f150 with 2. 7 got 285000 on my truck with no engine problems what so ever. ; MANNY (5★): I always put Amsoil in all my vehicles and I highly recommend oil the 0/20 signature series is the best on the market never had a problem with any of my vehicles using Amsoil ; SERGE (5★): Iam gone stay a amsiol fan forever ; SETH (5★): Great oil is the one thing I can rely on when the auto manufacturers keep reducing their oil viscosity to achieve fuel efficiency for some tree hugging politician. ; JERALD (5★): Read all the reviews , watched all the videos, it's the only oil I'll trust in my car ; WILSON (5★): Whether viewed in terms of quiet operation or evaporation loss, it stands alone—no other product can hold a candle to it.

I really wish you guys would get the amsoil ea17 filter back in stock, its been far to long they've been on back order. ; RONALD (5★): I have used this product in my 2000 Camry since 2004 (odometer: 71,000) until the present time (odometer 328,000 +) and in my 2006 Camry since May, 2025. I don't think that there is a better oil made! (By the way, I usually change the oil filter--I use the WIX oil filters--every 6 months. ) ; LARRY (5★): I have done oil samples and after next test it should be a very informative result ; BRODERICK (5★): From my 67 chevelle to my 2024 GMC Sierra my wife's car and the kids this oil has me covered ; HERBERT (5★): I have used it in my f150 with 2. 7 got 285000 on my truck with no engine problems what so ever. ; MANNY (5★): I always put Amsoil in all my vehicles and I highly recommend oil the 0/20 signature series is the best on the market never had a problem with any of my vehicles using Amsoil ; SERGE (5★): Iam gone stay a amsiol fan forever ; SETH (5★): Great oil is the one thing I can rely on when the auto manufacturers keep reducing their oil viscosity to achieve fuel efficiency for some tree hugging politician. ; JERALD (5★): Read all the reviews , watched all the videos, it's the only oil I'll trust in my car ; WILSON (5★): Whether viewed in terms of quiet operation or evaporation loss, it stands alone—no other product can hold a candle to it.

customer_reviews_summary: EUGENIO (5★): Great oil and filters always have everything I need for all my vehicles super fast shipping I highly recommend. ; SARKIS (5★): This is only for the people who are planning to use Amsoil for the first time. The people who used it before don’t need to read any reviews. . they know it. This is the best oil by far and it does exactly as the company says. I am using Amsoil for 20 years now on all my cars and never ever had any issues changing my oil every 10 or 25 k miles as recommended. ; SARKIS (5★): I am using only Amsoil oil for the last 20 years and don’t know (or care) if there is anything better or even close to be equal to it. ; PAUL B. (5★): I have used Amsoil products for over 20years. I use to get my oil tested at every oil change on my diesel engine. I no longer own a diesel and use this oil in my gas engine. I trust Amsoil products! ; DAVID (5★): I only use Amsoil oil in my vehicles and recommend to all my family ; MICHAEL (5★): Great oil, I will never use anything else! ; BOBBY (5★): Use Amsoil on all my vehicles and bikes in the Florida heat, and driving conditions it performs great. Highly recommend this product. ; DAVID (5★): I use Amsoil oil in all my motors and nothing else ; MICHAEL (5★): Great product as expected. Been converting everything to Amsoil and can feel the difference in how everything runs. This is especially true in my lawn equipment. ; JUSTIN (5★): Another purchase for me. Great product I will continue to use.

customer_reviews_summary: EUGENIO (5★): Great oil and filters always have everything I need for all my vehicles super fast shipping I highly recommend. ; SARKIS (5★): This is only for the people who are planning to use Amsoil for the first time. The people who used it before don’t need to read any reviews. . they know it. This is the best oil by far and it does exactly as the company says. I am using Amsoil for 20 years now on all my cars and never ever had any issues changing my oil every 10 or 25 k miles as recommended. ; SARKIS (5★): I am using only Amsoil oil for the last 20 years and don’t know (or care) if there is anything better or even close to be equal to it. ; PAUL B. (5★): I have used Amsoil products for over 20years. I use to get my oil tested at every oil change on my diesel engine. I no longer own a diesel and use this oil in my gas engine. I trust Amsoil products! ; DAVID (5★): I only use Amsoil oil in my vehicles and recommend to all my family ; MICHAEL (5★): Great oil, I will never use anything else! ; BOBBY (5★): Use Amsoil on all my vehicles and bikes in the Florida heat, and driving conditions it performs great. Highly recommend this product. ; DAVID (5★): I use Amsoil oil in all my motors and nothing else ; MICHAEL (5★): Great product as expected. Been converting everything to Amsoil and can feel the difference in how everything runs. This is especially true in my lawn equipment. ; JUSTIN (5★): Another purchase for me. Great product I will continue to use.

customer_reviews_summary: EUGENIO (5★): Great oil and filters always have everything I need for all my vehicles super fast shipping I highly recommend. ; SARKIS (5★): This is only for the people who are planning to use Amsoil for the first time. The people who used it before don’t need to read any reviews. . they know it. This is the best oil by far and it does exactly as the company says. I am using Amsoil for 20 years now on all my cars and never ever had any issues changing my oil every 10 or 25 k miles as recommended. ; SARKIS (5★): I am using only Amsoil oil for the last 20 years and don’t know (or care) if there is anything better or even close to be equal to it. ; PAUL B. (5★): I have used Amsoil products for over 20years. I use to get my oil tested at every oil change on my diesel engine. I no longer own a diesel and use this oil in my gas engine. I trust Amsoil products! ; DAVID (5★): I only use Amsoil oil in my vehicles and recommend to all my family ; MICHAEL (5★): Great oil, I will never use anything else! ; BOBBY (5★): Use Amsoil on all my vehicles and bikes in the Florida heat, and driving conditions it performs great. Highly recommend this product. ; DAVID (5★): I use Amsoil oil in all my motors and nothing else ; MICHAEL (5★): Great product as expected. Been converting everything to Amsoil and can feel the difference in how everything runs. This is especially true in my lawn equipment. ; JUSTIN (5★): Another purchase for me. Great product I will continue to use.

customer_reviews_summary: DON (5★): Great products use in everything I own ; SARKIS (5★): For 20 years I am using the Amsoil and will mot use anything else. I owned many (more than 20) different cars during these years and always used Amsoil. My mechanic wouldn’t believe I was really planning to change the oil every 10 or 25 k miles, but after changing it couple of times and seeing the condition of the used oil and my engine now he is not surprised anymore . ; JERRY (5★): Been using this in damm near everything ; JP (5★): I only use Amsoil in all my cars. Even got a few others on board. The best hands down. I feel it’s protecting my engine parts and lubricating what it needs to. ; DENNIS (5★): Bought the oil change kit that included 5qts of oil and the oil filter for my 2022 VW Taos. Maybe Amsoil should go one step further and include a crush washer that is required for the drain bolt at every oil change to ensure no drips. ; QUENTIN (5★): I love the bottle it comes in. Easy to poor in, the car also runs Better than it did before. It made it very smooth sounding ; DAVID (5★): This is the oil I'm using in my 23 Jeep Gladiator ecodiesel. I have almost 50k on the engine and recently had an analysis done after putting 5,900 miles on the oil. It came back saying: Metals are low next to universal averages, and those averages show typical wear for this type of engine after about 5,900 miles on the oil. These numbers show all is well with internal parts so feel free to add another 2K-3K miles to this oil. ; ALFRED (5★): I have been trusting AMSOIL oils for years. I just had the Audi 3. 0T engine internals inspected while doing some service, and the mechanic was surprised how clean it was at 130k miles. ; MICHAEL (5★): I have used AMSOIL for years on several different vehicles and have NEVER had any engine or transmission failure’s . I’ve finally switched all of my stock 22 RAM 1500 Ecodiesel fluids to full AMSOIL and my truck runs cooler and shifts smoother. Additionally, AMSOIL tech support can answer all of your stupid questions from torque specs to fill capacity. ; SCOTT (5★): Amsoil is always top quality. I wouldn’t use anything else in my diesel Jeep

customer_reviews_summary: DON (5★): Great products use in everything I own ; SARKIS (5★): For 20 years I am using the Amsoil and will mot use anything else. I owned many (more than 20) different cars during these years and always used Amsoil. My mechanic wouldn’t believe I was really planning to change the oil every 10 or 25 k miles, but after changing it couple of times and seeing the condition of the used oil and my engine now he is not surprised anymore . ; JERRY (5★): Been using this in damm near everything ; JP (5★): I only use Amsoil in all my cars. Even got a few others on board. The best hands down. I feel it’s protecting my engine parts and lubricating what it needs to. ; DENNIS (5★): Bought the oil change kit that included 5qts of oil and the oil filter for my 2022 VW Taos. Maybe Amsoil should go one step further and include a crush washer that is required for the drain bolt at every oil change to ensure no drips. ; QUENTIN (5★): I love the bottle it comes in. Easy to poor in, the car also runs Better than it did before. It made it very smooth sounding ; DAVID (5★): This is the oil I'm using in my 23 Jeep Gladiator ecodiesel. I have almost 50k on the engine and recently had an analysis done after putting 5,900 miles on the oil. It came back saying: Metals are low next to universal averages, and those averages show typical wear for this type of engine after about 5,900 miles on the oil. These numbers show all is well with internal parts so feel free to add another 2K-3K miles to this oil. ; ALFRED (5★): I have been trusting AMSOIL oils for years. I just had the Audi 3. 0T engine internals inspected while doing some service, and the mechanic was surprised how clean it was at 130k miles. ; MICHAEL (5★): I have used AMSOIL for years on several different vehicles and have NEVER had any engine or transmission failure’s . I’ve finally switched all of my stock 22 RAM 1500 Ecodiesel fluids to full AMSOIL and my truck runs cooler and shifts smoother. Additionally, AMSOIL tech support can answer all of your stupid questions from torque specs to fill capacity. ; SCOTT (5★): Amsoil is always top quality. I wouldn’t use anything else in my diesel Jeep

Easy to poor in, the car also runs Better than it did before. It made it very smooth sounding ; DAVID (5★): This is the oil I'm using in my 23 Jeep Gladiator ecodiesel. I have almost 50k on the engine and recently had an analysis done after putting 5,900 miles on the oil. It came back saying: Metals are low next to universal averages, and those averages show typical wear for this type of engine after about 5,900 miles on the oil. These numbers show all is well with internal parts so feel free to add another 2K-3K miles to this oil. ; ALFRED (5★): I have been trusting AMSOIL oils for years. I just had the Audi 3. 0T engine internals inspected while doing some service, and the mechanic was surprised how clean it was at 130k miles. ; MICHAEL (5★): I have used AMSOIL for years on several different vehicles and have NEVER had any engine or transmission failure’s . I’ve finally switched all of my stock 22 RAM 1500 Ecodiesel fluids to full AMSOIL and my truck runs cooler and shifts smoother. Additionally, AMSOIL tech support can answer all of your stupid questions from torque specs to fill capacity. ; SCOTT (5★): Amsoil is always top quality. I wouldn’t use anything else in my diesel Jeep

customer_reviews_summary: DON (5★): Great products use in everything I own ; SARKIS (5★): For 20 years I am using the Amsoil and will mot use anything else. I owned many (more than 20) different cars during these years and always used Amsoil. My mechanic wouldn’t believe I was really planning to change the oil every 10 or 25 k miles, but after changing it couple of times and seeing the condition of the used oil and my engine now he is not surprised anymore . ; JERRY (5★): Been using this in damm near everything ; JP (5★): I only use Amsoil in all my cars. Even got a few others on board. The best hands down. I feel it’s protecting my engine parts and lubricating what it needs to. ; DENNIS (5★): Bought the oil change kit that included 5qts of oil and the oil filter for my 2022 VW Taos. Maybe Amsoil should go one step further and include a crush washer that is required for the drain bolt at every oil change to ensure no drips. ; QUENTIN (5★): I love the bottle it comes in. Easy to poor in, the car also runs Better than it did before. It made it very smooth sounding ; DAVID (5★): This is the oil I'm using in my 23 Jeep Gladiator ecodiesel. I have almost 50k on the engine and recently had an analysis done after putting 5,900 miles on the oil. It came back saying: Metals are low next to universal averages, and those averages show typical wear for this type of engine after about 5,900 miles on the oil. These numbers show all is well with internal parts so feel free to add another 2K-3K miles to this oil. ; ALFRED (5★): I have been trusting AMSOIL oils for years. I just had the Audi 3. 0T engine internals inspected while doing some service, and the mechanic was surprised how clean it was at 130k miles. ; MICHAEL (5★): I have used AMSOIL for years on several different vehicles and have NEVER had any engine or transmission failure’s . I’ve finally switched all of my stock 22 RAM 1500 Ecodiesel fluids to full AMSOIL and my truck runs cooler and shifts smoother. Additionally, AMSOIL tech support can answer all of your stupid questions from torque specs to fill capacity. ; SCOTT (5★): Amsoil is always top quality. I wouldn’t use anything else in my diesel Jeep

customer_reviews_summary: DON (5★): Great products use in everything I own ; SARKIS (5★): For 20 years I am using the Amsoil and will mot use anything else. I owned many (more than 20) different cars during these years and always used Amsoil. My mechanic wouldn’t believe I was really planning to change the oil every 10 or 25 k miles, but after changing it couple of times and seeing the condition of the used oil and my engine now he is not surprised anymore . ; JERRY (5★): Been using this in damm near everything ; JP (5★): I only use Amsoil in all my cars. Even got a few others on board. The best hands down. I feel it’s protecting my engine parts and lubricating what it needs to. ; DENNIS (5★): Bought the oil change kit that included 5qts of oil and the oil filter for my 2022 VW Taos. Maybe Amsoil should go one step further and include a crush washer that is required for the drain bolt at every oil change to ensure no drips. ; QUENTIN (5★): I love the bottle it comes in. Easy to poor in, the car also runs Better than it did before. It made it very smooth sounding ; DAVID (5★): This is the oil I'm using in my 23 Jeep Gladiator ecodiesel. I have almost 50k on the engine and recently had an analysis done after putting 5,900 miles on the oil. It came back saying: Metals are low next to universal averages, and those averages show typical wear for this type of engine after about 5,900 miles on the oil. These numbers show all is well with internal parts so feel free to add another 2K-3K miles to this oil. ; ALFRED (5★): I have been trusting AMSOIL oils for years. I just had the Audi 3. 0T engine internals inspected while doing some service, and the mechanic was surprised how clean it was at 130k miles. ; MICHAEL (5★): I have used AMSOIL for years on several different vehicles and have NEVER had any engine or transmission failure’s . I’ve finally switched all of my stock 22 RAM 1500 Ecodiesel fluids to full AMSOIL and my truck runs cooler and shifts smoother. Additionally, AMSOIL tech support can answer all of your stupid questions from torque specs to fill capacity. ; SCOTT (5★): Amsoil is always top quality. I wouldn’t use anything else in my diesel Jeep

product_name: AMSOIL 10W-60 FS 100% Synthetic European Motor Oil
available_sizes: Quart Bottle, Quart Bottle, Case of 12
breadcrumb_navigation: HOME > Shop by Equipment > Car & Truck > European Motor Oil > AMSOIL 10W-60 FS 100% Synthetic European Motor Oil
customer_reviews_summary: DON (5★): Great products use in everything I own ; SARKIS (5★): For 20 years I am using the Amsoil and will mot use anything else. I owned many (more than 20) different cars during these years and always used Amsoil. My mechanic wouldn’t believe I was really planning to change the oil every 10 or 25 k miles, but after changing it couple of times and seeing the condition of the used oil and my engine now he is not surprised anymore . ; JERRY (5★): Been using this in damm near everything ; JP (5★): I only use Amsoil in all my cars. Even got a few others on board. The best hands down. I feel it’s protecting my engine parts and lubricating what it needs to. ; DENNIS (5★): Bought the oil change kit that included 5qts of oil and the oil filter for my 2022 VW Taos. Maybe Amsoil should go one step further and include a crush washer that is required for the drain bolt at every oil change to ensure no drips. ; QUENTIN (5★): I love the bottle it comes in. Easy to poor in, the car also runs Better than it did before. It made it very smooth sounding ; DAVID (5★): This is the oil I'm using in my 23 Jeep Gladiator ecodiesel. I have almost 50k on the engine and recently had an analysis done after putting 5,900 miles on the oil. It came back saying: Metals are low next to universal averages, and those averages show typical wear for this type of engine after about 5,900 miles on the oil. These numbers show all is well with internal parts so feel free to add another 2K-3K miles to this oil. ; ALFRED (5★): I have been trusting AMSOIL oils for years. I just had the Audi 3. 0T engine internals inspected while doing some service, and the mechanic was surprised how clean it was at 130k miles. ; MICHAEL (5★): I have used AMSOIL for years on several different vehicles and have NEVER had any engine or transmission failure’s . I’ve finally switched all of my stock 22 RAM 1500 Ecodiesel fluids to full AMSOIL and my truck runs cooler and shifts smoother. Additionally, AMSOIL tech support can answer all of your stupid questions from torque specs to fill capacity. ; SCOTT (5★): Amsoil is always top quality. I wouldn’t use anything else in my diesel Jeep

customer_reviews_summary: MICHAEL (5★): Use this one both of my lexus is300's. My daily had over 300k and my fun one had 150k. ; LEROY (5★): I purchased my AMSOIL products by word of mouth testimonial from someone who I trust concerning topics such as automotive care, and they were right! My 2006 Nissan Frontier 4. 0L is experiencing a rebirth in fuel economy! It's always been a great little truck, but since changing over to your product I believe that my engine is not working as hard as it was, and it has 207,000+ miles on it! Thanks Amsoil, I'm telling family and friends about it! ; THOMAS (5★): Very happy with Amsoil products. ; KANE (5★): I run this in my wife’s Kia that has close to 200,000 miles on it now. The engine doesn’t burn any or or make a sound. This oil has been great! ; JUAN CARLOS (5★): Changed oil on my 2014 Subaru forester, has 86,000 miles. Running great. ; CARROLL (5★): Switched to Amsoil for the price and reviews, change oil at 7k and still looks clean ; MANNON (5★): Unfortunately I could not use this product, I bought a new truck before the oil change was due and now it's just sitting here ; CHARLES (5★): Ive noticed a little better oil pressure on my 18 Silverado 5. 3 ,it calls for 0w20 oil and I personally think the 5w30 higher mileage works better for the hot Illinois summer's that we have and I've cut my oil filter apart and there always clean . ; MARIO (5★): Best oil for your car engine ; JOHNNY (5★): Been using the high mileage oil in my F-150 since the odometer passed 100,000 miles, engine runs smooth and very quiet, extremely happy with this motor oil.

customer_reviews_summary: MICHAEL (5★): Use this one both of my lexus is300's. My daily had over 300k and my fun one had 150k. ; LEROY (5★): I purchased my AMSOIL products by word of mouth testimonial from someone who I trust concerning topics such as automotive care, and they were right! My 2006 Nissan Frontier 4. 0L is experiencing a rebirth in fuel economy! It's always been a great little truck, but since changing over to your product I believe that my engine is not working as hard as it was, and it has 207,000+ miles on it! Thanks Amsoil, I'm telling family and friends about it! ; THOMAS (5★): Very happy with Amsoil products. ; KANE (5★): I run this in my wife’s Kia that has close to 200,000 miles on it now. The engine doesn’t burn any or or make a sound. This oil has been great! ; JUAN CARLOS (5★): Changed oil on my 2014 Subaru forester, has 86,000 miles. Running great. ; CARROLL (5★): Switched to Amsoil for the price and reviews, change oil at 7k and still looks clean ; MANNON (5★): Unfortunately I could not use this product, I bought a new truck before the oil change was due and now it's just sitting here ; CHARLES (5★): Ive noticed a little better oil pressure on my 18 Silverado 5. 3 ,it calls for 0w20 oil and I personally think the 5w30 higher mileage works better for the hot Illinois summer's that we have and I've cut my oil filter apart and there always clean . ; MARIO (5★): Best oil for your car engine ; JOHNNY (5★): Been using the high mileage oil in my F-150 since the odometer passed 100,000 miles, engine runs smooth and very quiet, extremely happy with this motor oil.

breadcrumb_navigation: HOME > Products > Motor Oil > High Zinc Motor Oil > AMSOIL Z-ROD® 10W-30 100% Synthetic Motor Oil
customer_reviews_summary: ALLEN (5★): after getting a new mower I decided to do things a bit different. I used a break-in oil for the first 10 hours and then switch to the Z-Rod oil. mower engines use a flat tappet cam, so this is going to help it live. I've read several stories that some engines have issue with the cams failing, heard that before. So, this is my attempt to get this thing to live a long life, because nothing is getting cheaper, just made cheaper. ; PHILIP (5★): I switched from Dominator to Z-Rod to get the added moisture protection since moving to SC. SC is humid and the car sits for long periods. Z-Rod provides all the protection of Dominater for my 800+ RWHP engine both running and sitting. ; GREG (5★): Love this all works great and does what it’s supposed to … ; JOEL (5★): This is a high quality oil with the perfect amount of zinc for my classic car with flat tappet cam lifters. The oil also seems to stay cleaner longer when used with a AMSOIL filler ; STEPHEN (5★): Always my first choice and has been since I discovered it. ; DAMON D (5★): Have been using this since I rebuilt my flat tappet cam engine. Its been great and oil comes out clean at each change even in a boosted engine. Worth every penny. ; STEVE (5★): the best oil you can find for a resto mod ; JOE (5★): I use Z-Rod in my pre 80’s vehicles. ; DENNIS M (5★): Use it on my 2004 Jeep TJ Rubicon 4. 0 LTR engine. Keeps the engine noise quiet. ; GREG (5★): We are a very happy with our oil!!!!

customer_reviews_summary: ALLEN (5★): after getting a new mower I decided to do things a bit different. I used a break-in oil for the first 10 hours and then switch to the Z-Rod oil. mower engines use a flat tappet cam, so this is going to help it live. I've read several stories that some engines have issue with the cams failing, heard that before. So, this is my attempt to get this thing to live a long life, because nothing is getting cheaper, just made cheaper. ; PHILIP (5★): I switched from Dominator to Z-Rod to get the added moisture protection since moving to SC. SC is humid and the car sits for long periods. Z-Rod provides all the protection of Dominater for my 800+ RWHP engine both running and sitting. ; GREG (5★): Love this all works great and does what it’s supposed to … ; JOEL (5★): This is a high quality oil with the perfect amount of zinc for my classic car with flat tappet cam lifters. The oil also seems to stay cleaner longer when used with a AMSOIL filler ; STEPHEN (5★): Always my first choice and has been since I discovered it. ; DAMON D (5★): Have been using this since I rebuilt my flat tappet cam engine. Its been great and oil comes out clean at each change even in a boosted engine. Worth every penny. ; STEVE (5★): the best oil you can find for a resto mod ; JOE (5★): I use Z-Rod in my pre 80’s vehicles. ; DENNIS M (5★): Use it on my 2004 Jeep TJ Rubicon 4. 0 LTR engine. Keeps the engine noise quiet. ; GREG (5★): We are a very happy with our oil!!!!

customer_reviews_summary: CHARLES (5★): I love this oil . But it’s getting so expensive ; JAMES (5★): I have been using Dominator Racing 15w50 since i built this engine in 2013. Approximately 400 hundred drag races . This spring removed and disassembled to freshen. Found almost zero wear. ; DAVID (5★): I've been using Amsoil for over 20 years. Three boats, two jet skis, Toyotas, GMC van, A class RV, Class B RV. ; Eugene (5★): Quality is excellent. Bought it for adding during hot weather. Recommend this oil to any one. ; Eugene (5★): Quality is excellent. Bought it for adding year around. I am recommend this oil to any one. ; ROBERT (5★): I got introduced to Amsoil in 1978 I built strictly race engines four and two strokes . I am on my 56th year of building raceengines. I’ve yet to find a better productproduct. It’s the best you can take that to the bank. ; Eugene (5★): I've bought this oil for adding to crankcase oil. Quality is high and this oil will serve very well to enhance general quality of all remaining oil. High TBN ( 8 ) will allow use all oil to the reasonable end. ; Eugene (5★): I've bought this oil for summer time adding. 500 cm3 ( 500ml ) above normal level will not hurt engine, but will effectively decrease engine temperature. I do believe in AMS quality and recommend this oil every one. ; MATT (5★): Running 10w40 Dominator in my King Motorsports-built turbo Honda D16A6. Great combination, noticeably quiet with less forged piston slap on cold starts. Has really consistent shear stability for higher revs. I run Pennzoil ultra platinum in my daily drivers because I do frequent oil changes, but anything I own that sees fewer miles per year gets Amsoil! ; JoyBoy (5★): Never used Amsoil Race oil in my EVO 9 2. 2L 4G63 7 bolt stroked engine aftermarket turbocharged full race prepped! Just got it on a dyno last week and it made 5 additional hp! We ran It 4x times and each time it made the same increase! Amazing! Stayed temperature stable too, normally on the dyno it gets a little warm. Awesome engine oil!

customer_reviews_summary: CHARLES (5★): I love this oil . But it’s getting so expensive ; JAMES (5★): I have been using Dominator Racing 15w50 since i built this engine in 2013. Approximately 400 hundred drag races . This spring removed and disassembled to freshen. Found almost zero wear. ; DAVID (5★): I've been using Amsoil for over 20 years. Three boats, two jet skis, Toyotas, GMC van, A class RV, Class B RV. ; Eugene (5★): Quality is excellent. Bought it for adding during hot weather. Recommend this oil to any one. ; Eugene (5★): Quality is excellent. Bought it for adding year around. I am recommend this oil to any one. ; ROBERT (5★): I got introduced to Amsoil in 1978 I built strictly race engines four and two strokes . I am on my 56th year of building raceengines. I’ve yet to find a better productproduct. It’s the best you can take that to the bank. ; Eugene (5★): I've bought this oil for adding to crankcase oil. Quality is high and this oil will serve very well to enhance general quality of all remaining oil. High TBN ( 8 ) will allow use all oil to the reasonable end. ; Eugene (5★): I've bought this oil for summer time adding. 500 cm3 ( 500ml ) above normal level will not hurt engine, but will effectively decrease engine temperature. I do believe in AMS quality and recommend this oil every one. ; MATT (5★): Running 10w40 Dominator in my King Motorsports-built turbo Honda D16A6. Great combination, noticeably quiet with less forged piston slap on cold starts. Has really consistent shear stability for higher revs. I run Pennzoil ultra platinum in my daily drivers because I do frequent oil changes, but anything I own that sees fewer miles per year gets Amsoil! ; JoyBoy (5★): Never used Amsoil Race oil in my EVO 9 2. 2L 4G63 7 bolt stroked engine aftermarket turbocharged full race prepped! Just got it on a dyno last week and it made 5 additional hp! We ran It 4x times and each time it made the same increase! Amazing! Stayed temperature stable too, normally on the dyno it gets a little warm. Awesome engine oil!

customer_reviews_summary: CHARLES (5★): I love this oil . But it’s getting so expensive ; JAMES (5★): I have been using Dominator Racing 15w50 since i built this engine in 2013. Approximately 400 hundred drag races . This spring removed and disassembled to freshen. Found almost zero wear. ; DAVID (5★): I've been using Amsoil for over 20 years. Three boats, two jet skis, Toyotas, GMC van, A class RV, Class B RV. ; Eugene (5★): Quality is excellent. Bought it for adding during hot weather. Recommend this oil to any one. ; Eugene (5★): Quality is excellent. Bought it for adding year around. I am recommend this oil to any one. ; ROBERT (5★): I got introduced to Amsoil in 1978 I built strictly race engines four and two strokes . I am on my 56th year of building raceengines. I’ve yet to find a better productproduct. It’s the best you can take that to the bank. ; Eugene (5★): I've bought this oil for adding to crankcase oil. Quality is high and this oil will serve very well to enhance general quality of all remaining oil. High TBN ( 8 ) will allow use all oil to the reasonable end. ; Eugene (5★): I've bought this oil for summer time adding. 500 cm3 ( 500ml ) above normal level will not hurt engine, but will effectively decrease engine temperature. I do believe in AMS quality and recommend this oil every one. ; MATT (5★): Running 10w40 Dominator in my King Motorsports-built turbo Honda D16A6. Great combination, noticeably quiet with less forged piston slap on cold starts. Has really consistent shear stability for higher revs. I run Pennzoil ultra platinum in my daily drivers because I do frequent oil changes, but anything I own that sees fewer miles per year gets Amsoil! ; JoyBoy (5★): Never used Amsoil Race oil in my EVO 9 2. 2L 4G63 7 bolt stroked engine aftermarket turbocharged full race prepped! Just got it on a dyno last week and it made 5 additional hp! We ran It 4x times and each time it made the same increase! Amazing! Stayed temperature stable too, normally on the dyno it gets a little warm. Awesome engine oil!

customer_reviews_summary: CHARLES (5★): I love this oil . But it’s getting so expensive ; JAMES (5★): I have been using Dominator Racing 15w50 since i built this engine in 2013. Approximately 400 hundred drag races . This spring removed and disassembled to freshen. Found almost zero wear. ; DAVID (5★): I've been using Amsoil for over 20 years. Three boats, two jet skis, Toyotas, GMC van, A class RV, Class B RV. ; Eugene (5★): Quality is excellent. Bought it for adding during hot weather. Recommend this oil to any one. ; Eugene (5★): Quality is excellent. Bought it for adding year around. I am recommend this oil to any one. ; ROBERT (5★): I got introduced to Amsoil in 1978 I built strictly race engines four and two strokes . I am on my 56th year of building raceengines. I’ve yet to find a better productproduct. It’s the best you can take that to the bank. ; Eugene (5★): I've bought this oil for adding to crankcase oil. Quality is high and this oil will serve very well to enhance general quality of all remaining oil. High TBN ( 8 ) will allow use all oil to the reasonable end. ; Eugene (5★): I've bought this oil for summer time adding. 500 cm3 ( 500ml ) above normal level will not hurt engine, but will effectively decrease engine temperature. I do believe in AMS quality and recommend this oil every one. ; MATT (5★): Running 10w40 Dominator in my King Motorsports-built turbo Honda D16A6. Great combination, noticeably quiet with less forged piston slap on cold starts. Has really consistent shear stability for higher revs. I run Pennzoil ultra platinum in my daily drivers because I do frequent oil changes, but anything I own that sees fewer miles per year gets Amsoil! ; JoyBoy (5★): Never used Amsoil Race oil in my EVO 9 2. 2L 4G63 7 bolt stroked engine aftermarket turbocharged full race prepped! Just got it on a dyno last week and it made 5 additional hp! We ran It 4x times and each time it made the same increase! Amazing! Stayed temperature stable too, normally on the dyno it gets a little warm. Awesome engine oil!

customer_reviews_summary: Stevie (5★): My 2005 GMC Savanna has 290. 000 km. Ever since using Amsoil Premium Protection 20-50 synthetic motor oil. My engine sounds new, less mechanical sounds related to high mileage, better performance and fuel economy. Excellent product. Thanks ; BRANDON (5★): I use this in my 2013 subaru wrx with built ej2. 5l with outfront motorsports forged pistons built block . Been amazing oil for this built engine. Change every 3000 . Still looks good. 40,000 miles on build using same oil! ; david (5★): Great products as always ; JONATHAN (5★): Becoming a member, getting your discount, and speed of delivery-all reasons to use Amsoil,products. ; ART (5★): I use this oil an average of 20,000 between changes always changing the filter and fresh oil each time dealer wants you to change it every 6000 miles the router of mind. My last oil change cost me $300 believe it or not they charge me $4. 75 a quart to install my own oil. Then they charge the audacity to charge me $100 to replace and change my fuel filter which I brought my own I own my own filter and my own fuel filter. These people are out of their mind with these kind of charges $229 an hour to service a vehicle just $229 an hour just to look at the damn thing#Warranty problems are an issue no matter what you get it done you do it yourself or you get them to do it the bastards will find some reason not to cover it ; JESUS (5★): The best oil and customer service on the market! PERIOD! ; DALE (5★): Bought this for my 86 Westfalia. Van has 216000 miles on it and keeps running. No lifter noise and no low oil pressure. Great product! ; GREG (5★): I've been using Amsoil 10w-40 with zinc, in my turbo charged Subaru for almost 20 years. I have an upgraded oiling system and track the car around 3 days a month. I've never had an issue with my engine. Great compression and my engine doesn't burn any oil. Of course, it helps that my tuner is awesome as well. Thanks Amsoil! ; FELIX (5★): very good product ; DON L. (5★): Got a new JD X590 and used this 10w40 at 18 hrs. of engine use to get the break-in oil changed. Going to use this Amsoil synthetic from here on out even though I have never had a engine failure from using Penzoil Platinum. I'm at 30 hrs of engine use now so time will tell.

customer_reviews_summary: Stevie (5★): My 2005 GMC Savanna has 290. 000 km. Ever since using Amsoil Premium Protection 20-50 synthetic motor oil. My engine sounds new, less mechanical sounds related to high mileage, better performance and fuel economy. Excellent product. Thanks ; BRANDON (5★): I use this in my 2013 subaru wrx with built ej2. 5l with outfront motorsports forged pistons built block . Been amazing oil for this built engine. Change every 3000 . Still looks good. 40,000 miles on build using same oil! ; david (5★): Great products as always ; JONATHAN (5★): Becoming a member, getting your discount, and speed of delivery-all reasons to use Amsoil,products. ; ART (5★): I use this oil an average of 20,000 between changes always changing the filter and fresh oil each time dealer wants you to change it every 6000 miles the router of mind. My last oil change cost me $300 believe it or not they charge me $4. 75 a quart to install my own oil. Then they charge the audacity to charge me $100 to replace and change my fuel filter which I brought my own I own my own filter and my own fuel filter. These people are out of their mind with these kind of charges $229 an hour to service a vehicle just $229 an hour just to look at the damn thing#Warranty problems are an issue no matter what you get it done you do it yourself or you get them to do it the bastards will find some reason not to cover it ; JESUS (5★): The best oil and customer service on the market! PERIOD! ; DALE (5★): Bought this for my 86 Westfalia. Van has 216000 miles on it and keeps running. No lifter noise and no low oil pressure. Great product! ; GREG (5★): I've been using Amsoil 10w-40 with zinc, in my turbo charged Subaru for almost 20 years. I have an upgraded oiling system and track the car around 3 days a month. I've never had an issue with my engine. Great compression and my engine doesn't burn any oil. Of course, it helps that my tuner is awesome as well. Thanks Amsoil! ; FELIX (5★): very good product ; DON L. (5★): Got a new JD X590 and used this 10w40 at 18 hrs. of engine use to get the break-in oil changed. Going to use this Amsoil synthetic from here on out even though I have never had a engine failure from using Penzoil Platinum. I'm at 30 hrs of engine use now so time will tell.

product_description: Shop AMSOIL SAE 30 Break-In Oil at AMSOIL. Find premium synthetic oil, filters and more online. Fast, free shipping available.
page_title: AMSOIL SAE 30 Break-In Oil | BRK - AMSOIL
available_sizes: Quart Bottle, Quart Bottles, Case of 12
breadcrumb_navigation: HOME > Products > Motor Oil > Racing Only Motor Oil > AMSOIL SAE 30 Break-In Oil
customer_reviews_summary: TYLER (4★): We have been using this oil for 3 years in a 7. 90 jr dragster. It outperforms most name brand oils in Friction, heat brake down, and fuel contamination (alcohol) The only thing I noticed with this purchase was the color of the oil was a little darker out of the container, normally it's a bright red like transmission fluid. Not sure if there was a change in formula or there was a slight more zinc added by miss calibrated mixture? ; JAMES (5★): All of the products were great, but I didn’t receive any gloves or funnels with my purchase. ; DANA (5★): I recommend this to all my customers for break-in before going to the T4 !! ; JEFF (5★): Why would you want to use any other product on your investment? ; JAMES (5★): Great for junior dragster motors ; Gio (5★): Good quality oil ; ROD (5★): I build custom street engines and racing engines. I've been using Break in oil in every engine for years. It has the proper additive package for flat tappet cam break in, plus limited friction modifiers to aid ring seating. Even in 900+hp sprint car engines we can see the EGT's change as the rings seat! GREAT product! ; WAYNE (5★): I have used this for break in of several rebuilt engines. I never had a problem with flat tappet camshaft break in or ring seating. ; DANIELE (5★): I have used this before a couple times and I would not use anything else as this has bee one of the best break-in oils I have ever used. I have just put together a SBC 383 stoker and I am about to put it on my engine start up stand to run it. I wish I could put a video of it on this review. Please Amsoil you should let us be able to put videos/pictures to our reviews to show what we are doing. Thank you for the best oil products out there. ; DDM (5★): Purchased a new Generac 15. 5 Kw generator for our hurricanes. Knowing that Amsoil is the pioneer of API rated synthetic motor oil, it was a no-brainer to go with their Break-In Oil to start protecting my valuable asset from the start. I plan on moving to the Amsoil Small Engine Oil after the break-in time has been met per Generac specs. Looking forward to a long reliable enginge life to support my emergency needs if required.

customer_reviews_summary: KARL (5★): Best oil for my acura ; RUSS (5★): my 06 liberty is starting to use/leak oil. Too expensive to use synthetic oil and have it disappear and keep replacing it. Thought I would try the Blend because its about the same price as oil from discount stores. This way I get to keep using AMSOIL. ; STEPHEN (5★): I HAVE BEEN A DEALER, AND HAVE USED AMSOIL FOR NEARLY 50 YEARS. I WOULDN'T USE ANY OTHER SYNTHETIC OIL. AL AMATUZIO STARTED THIS AND IT USED TO BE CALLED AMZOIL. THIS THE ONLY PRODUCT I USE IN ANY OF MY VEHICLES. ; MARK (5★): On one of our vehicles, we do not rack up very many miles on it, so we bought this since we changed the oil twice a year on it. It’s a lot more economical than putting in the signature series and changing it every six months on a vehicle that only travels 5000 miles a year. ; MARK (5★): Bought this for my wife’s ‘19 Frontier. Was using 0W-30 SS in it previously. She only drives about 3,000 in 6 months, so I thought I’d try something more economical. The truck runs very smooth and she likes the performance. ; WILLIAM (5★): Just what I wanted. Good oil ; TONY (5★): Amazing engine oil. Engine runs smooth and quiet. Oil consumption is almost eliminated. ; JOSHUA (5★): Overall it’s a great value, great product and I exclusively use AMSOIL in all my vehicles. ; RONALD (5★): It seems to be a good oil. don't know much about it ; Dave (5★): Purchased Amsoil 0W-20 Synthetic Blend to help my new '24 Honda Civic Type R break-in a little better than running full synthetic from new. Changed factory fill oil to Amsoil Synthetic Blend at 600 miles, will do so again at 1500 miles, then switch to full synthetic from 3000 miles on. Old school overkill perhaps, but a car is only new once, and deserves a good break-in. Many knowledeable people I know recommend Amsoil, so I'm going with that. Car runs great!

product_description: Shop AMSOIL 5W-30 Synthetic-Blend Motor Oil at AMSOIL. Find premium synthetic oil, filters and more online. Fast, free shipping available.
page_title: AMSOIL 5W-30 Synthetic-Blend Motor Oil | SB530 - AMSOIL
available_sizes: Quart Bottle, Quart Bottle, Case of 12, 55 Gallon Drum, Gallon Jug, Gallon Jug, Case of 4
breadcrumb_navigation: HOME > Products > Motor Oil > Gasoline Motor Oil > AMSOIL 5W-30 Synthetic-Blend Motor Oil
customer_reviews_summary: KARL (5★): Best oil for my acura ; RUSS (5★): my 06 liberty is starting to use/leak oil. Too expensive to use synthetic oil and have it disappear and keep replacing it. Thought I would try the Blend because its about the same price as oil from discount stores. This way I get to keep using AMSOIL. ; STEPHEN (5★): I HAVE BEEN A DEALER, AND HAVE USED AMSOIL FOR NEARLY 50 YEARS. I WOULDN'T USE ANY OTHER SYNTHETIC OIL. AL AMATUZIO STARTED THIS AND IT USED TO BE CALLED AMZOIL. THIS THE ONLY PRODUCT I USE IN ANY OF MY VEHICLES. ; MARK (5★): On one of our vehicles, we do not rack up very many miles on it, so we bought this since we changed the oil twice a year on it. It’s a lot more economical than putting in the signature series and changing it every six months on a vehicle that only travels 5000 miles a year. ; MARK (5★): Bought this for my wife’s ‘19 Frontier. Was using 0W-30 SS in it previously. She only drives about 3,000 in 6 months, so I thought I’d try something more economical. The truck runs very smooth and she likes the performance. ; WILLIAM (5★): Just what I wanted. Good oil ; TONY (5★): Amazing engine oil. Engine runs smooth and quiet. Oil consumption is almost eliminated. ; JOSHUA (5★): Overall it’s a great value, great product and I exclusively use AMSOIL in all my vehicles. ; RONALD (5★): It seems to be a good oil. don't know much about it ; Dave (5★): Purchased Amsoil 0W-20 Synthetic Blend to help my new '24 Honda Civic Type R break-in a little better than running full synthetic from new. Changed factory fill oil to Amsoil Synthetic Blend at 600 miles, will do so again at 1500 miles, then switch to full synthetic from 3000 miles on. Old school overkill perhaps, but a car is only new once, and deserves a good break-in. Many knowledeable people I know recommend Amsoil, so I'm going with that. Car runs great!
